description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the openjdk:8-jdk Docker image. Define variables ANDROID_BUILD_TOOLS=29.0.3, ANDROID_COMPILE_SDK=29, ANDROID_SDK_TOOLS=4333796 and a before_script that runs apt-get update and install wget tar unzip lib32stdc++6 lib32z1, downloads the Android SDK tools zip, unzips it, installs the Android platform ${ANDROID_COMPILE_SDK}, platform-tools, and build-tools ${ANDROID_BUILD_TOOLS}, sets ANDROID_HOME and updates PATH, makes gradlew executable, accepts all SDK licenses, and restores pipefail handling. Add a single build stage with a buildRelease job that runs ./gradlew assembleDebug, and publishes the app/build/outputs/ directory as an artifact that expires after one day.
